home.title: Jagruk Mahila
home.subtitle: Empowering Women Through Knowledge and Rights
home.hero_title: Support, safety, and legal awareness in one place
home.hero_subtitle: Get urgent help fast, ask the AI assistant simple questions, and explore the laws designed to protect women in India.
home.about_text:
Jagruk Mahila is a digital resource hub dedicated to the legal empowerment and socio-economic advancement of women.

The platform simplifies complex judicial frameworks into accessible, practical guidance — transforming intimidating legal statutes into everyday tools for personal security and agency.

It functions as a critical first point of contact for crisis support, prioritizing immediate safety through emergency triage while fostering long-term justice through informed awareness and advocacy.

about_points.point_1: Find emergency helplines and trusted support options quickly.
about_points.point_2: Understand your rights through simple, topic-based legal guidance.
about_points.point_3: Explore women-focused laws covering safety, marriage, cyber abuse, and more.
about_points.point_4: Use the AI assistant for short, plain-language help when you are unsure where to start.

home.explore_subtitle: Open any section below to learn about protections, remedies, and legal options.

cases.title: Landmark Cases
cases.banner: These cases shaped the laws that protect you today.

ncw.name: National Commission for Women (NCW)
ncw.address: Plot-21, Jasola Institutional Area, New Delhi – 110025, India

nhrc.name: National Human Rights Commission (NHRC)
nhrc.address: Manav Adhikar Bhavan, C-Block, GPO Complex, INA, New Delhi – 110023

mosje.name: Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment (MoSJE)
mosje.description: Focuses on welfare of marginalized sections including disabled, elderly, and backward classes.

purposes.emergency_112: Pan-India single number for Police, Fire, and Health emergencies
purposes.women_181: A national-level helpline number for women in distress
purposes.distress_1091: Specific helpline for women in distress, managed by local police
purposes.ncw_full: Direct helpline number for the National Commission for Women
purposes.ncw_short: New short-code number launched by NCW for quicker access

chat.welcome:
Namaste 🙏 I'm Sahayata Bot, your NCW legal assistant.

I'm here to help you understand your rights and connect you with the right support. How can I help you today?

If you're in immediate danger, please call 112 or 181 right away.
chat.error_fallback: Could not get a response. Please try again.
chat.error_request: I could not understand that request properly. Please try asking a little more clearly.
chat.error_busy: The chat is busy right now. Please wait a moment and try again.
chat.error_service: Chat is not available right now. Please try again in a little while.
chat.accuracy_notice: This assistant is powered by AI and can make mistakes.
chat.report_hint: This report will be submitted for this AI response only.
chat.report_prompt: Choose a reason to report this response.
chat.report_success_message: Thanks. Your report has been recorded.
chat.report_error_message: There was a problem sending the report. Please try again.
chat.report_error_try_again: We could not submit that report right now. Please check the details and try again.
chat.report_error_busy: Report submission is busy right now. Please try again in a moment.
chat.report_error_service: Report submission is not available right now. Please try again later.
chat.other_reason_required: Please enter a short reason for "Something else".
chat.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email or leave it blank.
chat.backend_url_missing: AI service is not configured right now. Please try again later.
